headline: Wall Street Analysts See a 37.7% Upside in Autodesk (ADSK): Can the Stock Really Move This High?
summary: The average of price targets set by Wall Street analysts indicates a potential upside of 37.7% in Autodesk (ADSK). While the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric is questionable, the positive trend in earnings estimate revisions might translate into an upside in the stock.

headline: Here's How Much a $1000 Investment in Autodesk Made 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
summary: Why investing for the long run, especially if you buy certain popular stocks, could reap huge rewards.
